nodes.label: Tecda Maniquí Backend API
nodes.rationale: Designed following decoupled layer architecture (SOLID) to maximize testability and maintenance.

nodes.label: Testing Strategy
nodes.rationale: Uses a Testing Pyramid approach: Unit (node:test), Integration (Bash+Curl), and DB (SQL scripts).

nodes.label: Composition Root
nodes.rationale: Implements Dependency Injection (DIP) to allow total decoupling between layers.

nodes.label: AppError
nodes.rationale: Base class for operational system errors.
